task_completion.description: Verify that a Sales Order or Quotation is created for 'Meridian Pacific Group' with the correct products and quantities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Sales Order/Quotation screen in Odoo. The Customer field should be 'Meridian Pacific Group'. The order lines should show 'Standing Desk Pro - Height Adjustable' with a quantity of 15, and 'Executive High-Back Chair' with a quantity of 8.

task_completion.description: Verify that the payment terms are set to 30 Days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Payment Terms' field on the Sales Order or Invoice screen. It should be set to '30 Days' or a similar 30-day option.

task_completion.description: Verify that the requested internal note was added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Internal Notes' tab or section on the Sales Order. It should contain the text 'Priority order — expedite shipping' (or at least 'Priority order').

task_completion.description: Verify that the Sales Order has been confirmed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the status bar at the top right of the Sales Order. The status should be 'Sales Order' (highlighted) rather than 'Quotation' or 'Quotation Sent'.

task_completion.description: Verify that an invoice was created and posted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Invoice screen linked to the Sales Order. The status of the invoice should be 'Posted' (not 'Draft').

task_completion.description: Verify that the invoice has been fully paid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green 'Paid' or 'In Payment' ribbon/banner on the Invoice screen, indicating that a payment has been registered for the full amount ($13,135.00).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo application, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the Odoo forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with Odoo input fields, dropdowns, and buttons, rather than just displaying a text file with the answers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI using database commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of terminal windows running SQL queries or Python scripts to directly modify the odoo_demo database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer: Meridian Pacific Group. Product 1: Standing Desk Pro - Height Adjustable (Qty: 15, Price: $649.00). Product 2: Executive High-Back Chair (Qty: 8, Price: $425.00). Expected Order Total: $13,135.00. Payment Terms: 30 Days. Internal Note: Priority order — expedite shipping.
